reasoning: Preorder event in 2 days — high volatility window.
High 'buy the rumor, sell the news' risk before launch.

events.title: Trailer 1
events.impact: Set franchise hype record; TTWO closed +1.8% next session.

events.title: Trailer 2
events.impact: Confirmed Vice City setting; TTWO +3.2% week-over-week.

events.title: Cover Art
events.impact: Marketing kickoff. Generally bullish for pre-release positioning.

events.title: Preorders Open
events.impact: First hard demand signal. Historically high-volatility event.

events.title: Launch
events.impact: Global release. Classic 'sell the news' risk window.

next_catalyst.title: Preorders Open
next_catalyst.impact: First hard demand signal. Historically high-volatility event.
